Name: HomeMaid AB
Description:
HomeMaid grundades 1997 av Birgitta Josefsson. Hon hade den enkla och tydliga idén om att göra vardagen lättare för sina kunder. Sedan dess har HomeMaid hjälpt tusentals kunder till en renare, mer trivsam vardag genom att hjälpa till med hemstädning, företagsstädning, fastighetsstäd, fönsterputs och mycket mer. 

Vi vet hur svårt det kan vara att få tiden att räcka till åt jobb, familj, återhämtning och hushållssysslor. Vårt uppdrag är att hjälpa dig skapa en vardag som du trivs med, och som fungerar. Att ta hjälp av ett proffs är ofta en stor lättnad. Du kan släppa tankarna på städningen och känna dig trygg i vetskapen att det blir ordentligt gjort. Vi brinner för att skapa en enklare, renare vardag för dig, ett liv med lugn och ro och färre måsten.

Huvudkontoret ligger i Halmstad sedan år 2000 men vi finns idag från Skåne i söder till Sundsvall i norr. 

HomeMaid AB (publ) ingår i en koncern med 5 bolag där HomeMaid AB är koncernmoderbolaget. HomeMaid AB (publ) är noterat på Spotlight och har drygt 1 800 aktieägare.

Name: Thuis-APK
Description:
Woning APK Preventief voor Installaties:

    •    Preventief Onderhoud: Periodieke inspecties van elektrotechnische installaties (zoals elektrische systemen, bedrading en schakelkasten) om mogelijke risico’s te identificeren en storingen te voorkomen.

    •    Installatie Controle: Grondige inspectie van verwarmingssystemen, ventilatie en andere huishoudelijke installaties om te waarborgen dat ze voldoen aan de laatste normen en veilig functioneren.

    •    Risicoanalyse: Beoordeling van de staat van de installaties en de identificatie van potentiële veiligheidsrisico’s of inefficiënties.

Optioneel: Verdiepend Onderzoek bij Problemen of Gebreken:
    •    Diagnose van Problemen: Het grondig onderzoeken van technische storingen en gebreken in installaties, zoals onregelmatigheden in de elektriciteit of verwarming.
    •    Oorzaakanalyse: Het traceren van de onderliggende oorzaken van storingen en gebreken, inclusief rapportage met oplossingsrichtingen.
    •    Technisch Advies: Het aanbieden van gedetailleerd advies over hoe gebreken verholpen kunnen worden, met focus op kostenbesparing en langdurige efficiëntie.
Certificering en Veiligheidsrapporten:
    •    Veiligheidskeuring: Het verstrekken van keuringsrapporten voor installaties die voldoen aan alle relevante wet- en regelgeving, voor gemoedsrust van de woningeigenaren.
    •    Certificaten: Voor installaties die voldoen aan de normen 8025, bieden we keuringsrapporten die de veiligheid en betrouwbaarheid bevestigen.

Deze diensten helpen woningeigenaren meer zekerheid te krijgen over de staat van hun woning en installaties, door zowel preventieve controles als diepgaand onderzoek bij gebreken aan te bieden.

Name: The Allies Network
Description:
Our Story
HOW IT STARTED
The word "burnout" - it's been all over the news for the last few years.  Workers are burnt out.  Parents are burnt out.  Homeowners are burnt out.  Managers are burnt out.  People are burnt out.

Burnout isn't a new phenomenon, but the recent scale of it is notable - we have more to do, and less time to do it.  At the same time, we're becoming more and more socially isolated at all times, and neglecting our health, happiness, and serenity.

At the same time, accepting help from strangers can be hard.  Gig apps have sprouted up in every major sector, but you never know who you're going to get - and who you can trust.  Anybody can sign up for a gig app.

That's where the concept for the Allies was born.  Having done multiple gig app stints herself with no real qualifications, and at the same time hurting for help as a parent, worker, and person, Sarah wanted to create a small, local network of qualified individuals to support the overall health of her neighbors.  A clean, organized household, combined with support for a healthy lifestyle, could be achieved without being a superhuman - it just takes an Ally.

In 2014, Sarah had this grand idea to start a business just like this - and then, life got in the way - in really great ways.  Through great careers, bosses, colleagues, and experiences, she developed herself, but the idea (and the original organization) was always present in the back of her mind.  But after the pandemic hit, the need for actual vetted support in households became more important than ever, as gig apps sprouted up and literally anyone could sign up to do... well, anything.  Thus, Event Allies became The Allies Network.

The Ampersand
WHY AN AMPERSAND?
Our logo, the ampersand, sometimes called the 27th letter of the alphabet, is the symbol for 'and' - & it encompasses what the Allies do.

The Allies provide you an 'and' - someone to help out with those little things that are getting in the way of you living your best life.

Name: Odd Mom Odd Jobs LLC
Description:
My name is Alexandra Canfield, I wanted to be a mother first, but also loved being independent and making my own way I life. So, I knew there had to be a change, SOMETHING had to give….  
 
  I was in a place where I owned a home, I worked for a state position and I was going for a Bachelor’s degree in Healthcare administration. In addition to that I have been single mother raising an active boy for 8 years. My son had so many labels on his shoulders it was getting to be too much, he was not happy and I couldn’t watch that continue. 
  
  I had previously lived in Salem/Keizer, but being there was no more passion, I rented my home out, found a job and a 2-bedroom apartment and moved to Bend.

  With sparkling opportunity around every corner, I still felt stuck, so I continued climbing the corporate ladder, my son was in his own way screaming for help and I was torn. Job Child Job Child, knowing which one wins I had to make the hardest choice and go against everything I was taught, and I left my corporate job.

  Everyone judged me I was alone, I knew I could make anything work, and then I decided to start this business. I have old school teachings and just haven't fit anywhere yet. So, I made my own and I want to make a difference truly by helping with those tasks you may not have time for so that you can then prioritize what matters to you.

  If I can make these differences over time I will have a full love tank and service a purpose beyond what I could dream.

  I am not afraid of hard work and I cannot wait to see the jobs and people I will get to encounter and have already through this amazing experience.

  "I think being different, going against the grain of society, is the greatest thing in the world." -Elijah Woods

  "When we lose the right to be different, we lose the privilege to be free." -Charles Evans Hughes

  "Not a few men who cherish lofty and noble ideas hide them under a bushel for fear of being called different." -Martin Luther King, Jr.

A moving experience that is simple, hassle free, and fun!

We do local moving differently: the neighborly way. Our small team of skilled movers approaches each move with a philosophy of empathy, positivity, and professionalism. We’ll help you plan, prepare, and execute your move from start to finish — and all you need is a rental truck.

We’ve proven time after time that we offer a moving experience that can’t be matched by our larger competitors. Trusting us with your next move is a chance for us to show you why our moving company is the #1 choice in Northwestern Washington!

How we can help:
Local Moves
We assist with loading and unloading the moving truck, protecting and securing items, furniture disassembly/reassembly, and can even assist with packing (by request). Studio apartment to 5+ bedroom homes and commercial moves ranging from in-office to multi-office locations. Currently serving Whatcom, Skagit, Island, and Snohomish counties.

Long-Distance Moves
Loading and unloading long distance moves departing from or arriving to northwest Washington, protecting and securing items, furniture disassembly/reassembly, and packing assistance (by request).

Other Moves
Whether downsizing for retirement, preparing for new flooring installation, or getting ready for a move, we can assist with multi-top moves (like storage, thrift stores, or refuse), provide in-home moves, or assist with furniture staging.

Your Loved Ones
Some moves can be especially difficult, like moving to a retirement community or assisted living home. We understand that booking and coordinating these moves is also difficult. Our expertise extends beyond basic visual inspections. We are active listeners, expert communicators, and understand the value of confidentiality, privacy, and discretion.

This accreditation reflects our commitment to running our business with the utmost integrity and professionalism, undergoing rigorous vetting, including criminal background checks, proper insurance coverage, bonding, and adherence to the NHWA's Code of Ethics.

Experience the gold standard in Home Watch services with SunSitters, your professional partner in luxury Home Watch and Concierge Services in Lakewood Ranch, FL. Hinter der Arbeit und der Routine den Menschen und seine Trauer zu sehen und ihm ein klein wenig davon abzunehmen, ist unser Ziel. Voor Hold Me Stand is een huis niet echt schoon als het niet opgeruimd is. Je kunt het stof weghalen, de vloeren boenen en de ramen laten glanzen, maar als er teveel spullen liggen die het zicht belemmert, is het alsof je er niet volledig doorheen kunt ademen. Opruimen is de sleutel tot een ruimte die niet alleen schoon is, maar ook rust en helderheid biedt. Want soms is het niet alleen het vuil dat een ruimte vies maakt, maar ook de chaos die zich erin ophoopt.

Het is de energie van het herstellen van balans, het teruggeven van helderheid, zowel fysiek als mentaal. En uiteindelijk maakt dat het voor ons waardevol – omdat wij weten dat wij niet alleen een ruimte hebben opgeruimd, maar ook de ruimte hebben gecreëerd voor de mensen om erin te ademen, zich vrij te voelen, en zelfs tot rust te komen in hun eigen hoofd.

A World Free of Harmful Chemicals

Today, we are becoming increasingly conscious of our health and our environment. We’re more selective in what we eat and drink and are more aware of how fragile the environment is. Yet few of us give much thought to the products we use in our own homes. Every day, we use cleaning products to scrub plates and make floors and mirrors shine, but we seldom realise that some of those ingredients are harmful to our bodies and our planet.
LAGA believes that information transparency is a basic consumer right. It enables people to make informed decisions about their health and the environment. At LAGA, we make sure that everyone knows what is inside our products. We also believe that house cleaning products should be affordable, efficient, and safe for all.

It’s human nature to strive for a better world, and it only takes a human, not a superhero, to do so. Change starts from small steps, and the first step can be taken in our homes.

Name: The Neat Retreat
Description:
I’ve always had a knack for organizing, and attribute my affinity for order to having Swiss heritage, along with growing up in a home surrounded by lots of “stuff.” I began organizing in a professional capacity with a friend who has since moved away, but my desire to help people live simpler lives remains. 

Perhaps you're generally an organized person, and your need for assistance is more of a one-time situation – such as preparing for a move or inheriting an estate – and you simply don't have the time to tackle this by yourself. Or perhaps organizational issues have been a consistent struggle throughout your life. Regardless of your unique situation, rest assured that I have experience working with clients from all walks of life. I know it can be an intimidating prospect to ask for help, and share aspects of your personal life with someone you just met. I will always treat you with empathy, respect and confidentiality – with a shoulder to cry on and hopefully some laughs along the way.  

We’ll begin with an initial consultation to talk about your organizational goals. This may involve you sending pictures, a video chat, or me seeing the space in person. Together, we'll strategize your best use of space and estimate the amount of time required. If you decide to hire me, we'll work side-by-side to go through each item, sorting into piles for keep, donate or throw away. I can also connect you with additional services such as a handyman should you need any shelving or cabinet systems installed.

One organizing session is $300 and includes three hours working in your space, supplies such as labels and garbage bags, travel to and from your location, time spent shopping for containers, and one car load of donations hauled away per session. If your project requires more than one session, packages can be purchased at significant savings. I also include a customized step-by-step plan for assigned “homework” between sessions to expedite your progress.

Name: Coastal Home Watch & Concierge, LLC
Description: Leaving your home or vacation property unoccupied can be extremely stressful but also leaves your investment susceptible to unwanted squatters, theft, vandalism, water/humidity issues leading to mold, pest/rodent infestation, the devastating effects of a tropical storm, and much, much more!  In addition, many homeowners are not aware that an unoccupied home may not comply with the vacancy clause in their homeowner’s insurance, leaving their home and property at significant risk!  WHAT IS HOME WATCH?  Home Watch is not a property management service and is not house-sitting.  It is a professional service that provides a “visual inspection of your home and property, looking for obvious issues”.  At Coastal Home Watch & Concierge, LLC we provide proactive and customized Home Watch checks of an unoccupied home and property.  We are the “flip flops on the ground” advocates invested in protecting your home and property while you are not there.  To best protect our clients, we are fully insured, bonded, and accredited by the National Home Watch Association.  WHY HIRE A HOME WATCH COMPANY?  Our number one priority is to alleviate the stress clients experience when their homes are unoccupied and unprotected!  Family members, neighbors, and friends - despite their best intentions - lack the experience and trained eye to detect routine issues that may go unnoticed, leading to significant and costly damage that is difficult to manage from a distance.  At the completion of a customized and regularly scheduled Home Watch check, clients will receive a detailed report (including pictures) outlining the outcome of the check and identifying all issues.  If requested, we will schedule and manage contractors/vendors to complete needed repairs both quickly and professionally, avoiding further, costly, and time-consuming damage to your home and property.  Contact us today for a free consultation!
Location: Ocean Isle Beach, North Carolina, NORTH CAROLINA

With all the things we are expected to juggle on a daily basis, organization can sometimes take the back burner. Often, all someone needs is a clean slate to begin a new chapter with a better mindset.

ترميم الحمامات والمطابخ والمسابح والخزانات: نقوم بأعمال الترميم بدقة وجودة عالية لتلبية احتياجاتكم.

نفخر بتقديم خدماتنا في عدة مدن سعودية مثل الرياض، جدة، الدمام، مكة، الطائف، المدينة، أبها، وغيرها. نحن نسعى جاهدين لتحقيق رضا العملاء وتوفير أعلى مستويات الجودة والاحترافية في كل خدمة نقدمها.

# رسالتنا

رسالتنا هي تقديم خدمات منزلية استثنائية تجمع بين الجودة والكفاءة والتميز، لنكون الخيار الأمثل لكل من يبحث عن حلول منزلية موثوقة ومبتكرة.

# رؤيتنا

نسعى لأن نكون الشركة الرائدة في تقديم خدمات المنازل في المملكة العربية السعودية، ونسعى لتحقيق الاستدامة والتميز في كل جانب من جوانب أعمالنا.

# قيمنا

- الجودة: نلتزم بتقديم أعلى مستويات الجودة في كل خدمة نقدمها.
- الاحترافية: نعمل بأخلاقيات عالية ومهنية في كل تفاعل نقوم به.
- الابتكار: نسعى جاهدين لتقديم حلول مبتكرة ومتطورة لاحتياجات عملائنا.

Name: Wicked Clean Bins
Description:
We’re Mainers too. Wicked Clean Bins is a Maine-based, Mainer-owned, small business curbside trash bin cleaning service. Our state-of-the-art equipment allows us to quickly, safely, and with the environment in mind, clean your bins! Our team will sanitize, disinfect, and deodorize your trash bins with the utmost respect for our local environment while eliminating needless water waste.

We’ve all got trash bins, but we don’t love the smell – especially during hot summers. Our bins carry harmful diseases and bacteria that can live on, in, and around your trash and recycling bins.

Our services generally operate from mid-April to November – depending on the weather. When it’s cold out, bacteria go dormant and odors are blocked. However, in warmer months bacteria come out to play and odors join them!

Name: kentuckiana moving, llc
Description: Hello, I'm Jonathan Richards, and at the age of 18, I embarked on a journey that has brought us to where we are today. Back in 2016, we started our business by renting trucks out of my mother's house. It was a humble beginning, but it was the seed from which our company has grown. Fast forward to now, and I'm proud to say that at the age of 25, we've established ourselves as a prominent player in the moving industry. Our headquarters is now a 7000-square-foot facility in downtown New Albany, Indiana, which we proudly call home. Over the years, we've expanded our operation to include more than 10 trucks and a team of 20 full-time professionals. Our journey has seen us handle moves for a diverse range of clients, from defense contractors and military personnel to corporate relocations, celebrities, politicians, and even individuals on the Forbes list, spanning the entire country. Along the way, we've learned from our mistakes and honed our expertise in logistics, sales, hiring, dispatching, and maintenance to provide our customers with top-notch service. Name: Oven Beyond
Description:
Oven Beyond  is a professional oven cleaning company, valeting ovens and other appliances – including AGAs, ranges, microwaves and barbeques.
We give your oven a complete and professional clean, restoring it to a showroom-like condition. We don’t just give it a quick wipe over – we’re much more thorough than that! Our unique cleaning process involves removing all of the racks, trays, fan plates and bulb covers, and treating the whole oven with our unique cleaning products and techniques.

The trays and other items in your oven that can be removed are placed into a custom and purpose-built dip tank, and allowed to soak to remove all the built-up grime and grease. Because of the cleaning products and techniques we use, as soon as we’re finished, your oven will be immediately ready to use for cooking. No waiting around for unpleasant fumes to clear!

Name: fiNest Home Services
Description:
fiNest Home Services was founded with a clear mission: to help individuals age in place. No one should have to choose between staying in their home and their safety. By providing expert Aging-in-Place home accessibility modifications, remodeling, and proactive home maintenance, we empower people to remain in the communities they love while ensuring their homes evolve with their needs.

With a healthcare career, we have had the privilege of working with individuals navigating significant life transitions. Time and again, we witnessed patients returning home, only to find that their once-comfortable space was no longer safe or accessible. Stairs became obstacles, bathrooms posed risks, and doorways no longer welcomed movement with ease. It was difficult to witness people facing challenges in their own homes, a place that typically offers comfort, independence, and security.

Our work is about improving lives. Every remodeling and accessibility project we take on is an opportunity to beautify a space and create a safer, more accessible environment. 

At fiNest Home Services, we aim to create homes that are Livable for a Lifetime.

Sometimes, while planning for vacation gateways, we might have resources but do not have a person to drive our cars, for these scenarios, we have to make a bunch of calls to different agencies, finding out the right data source. But, wouldn’t it be much easier to have all the contact at one place and get that help instantly with one click without even worrying about security, since it’s a complete secure platform. People who do not will to keep household workers, drivers, gardeners, etc on a monthly basis often might face difficulty on some days and would want someone to help them. We come up with the solution to provide help to those people by providing a bunch of services from our service partners. The idea of this platform is to provide the services such as maids, cooks, drivers, gardeners, carpenters, electricians, salon for male/female based on the different types of services as and when needed. The services would come in a package based or hour based depending on the work asked and the efforts required from our service partners. This way, we look forward to helping serve the people who are very busy in their professional lives, as well as, we would be providing an opportunity for blue-collar workers to earn for themselves. This platform would be the first of its kind and through our survey, we realized that it has been needed across working class people for a very long time. We strive to change the existing system for finding out help that is not available online.

Name: ALO MAIDS Cleaning Services
Description:
ALO MAIDS Cleaning Services was established on January 09, 2013, in response to a widespread practice in UAE (during 2008-2012) where cleaning workers were barely paid salaries of AED400 to AED800 dirhams a month and were not allowed holidays for years or until they would complete their labor contract period. There was no concept of medical insurance or over time. Most of the cleaners we interviewed worked minimum 10hrs a day and without any over time.

The company is run on the principles of social entrepreneurship and believes in the responsibility of businesses to address world’s social, economic and environmental problems.

The company offers reliable residential and commercial cleaning services with both eco-friendly and conventional cleaning supplies and tools, depending on the demand. And we promote products that support environmental protection and longer lasting hygiene.

ALO MAIDS Cleaning was changed to Alo Maids & Technical Services in 2016 and the businesses are contributing to the below United Nation’s Sustainable Development Goals.

Goal 1 – Poverty eradication
Goal 5 – Gender equality
Goal 8 – Decent work & growth for all
Goal 10 – Reduction of inequality
Goal 12 – Responsible production & responsible consumption
Goal 13 – Climate change

Name: DIE STEINREINIGER
Description:

Uns liegt sehr daran, dass wir jeden einzelnen Kunden mit Ehrlichkeit und Transparenz beraten. Wir setzen speziell angefertigte Produkte ein, die nicht auf dem allgemeinen Markt erhältlich sind, um nachhaltige und sichtbare Erfolge zu erzielen. Diese bewährte Praxis haben wir seit über einem Jahrzehnt erfolgreich umgesetzt. Zusätzlich engagieren wir uns durch einen Teil unseres Umsatzes in der Unterstützung regionaler Vereine und Institutionen.

Wir sind stolz darauf, eine der ersten professionellen Steinreinigungsfirmen in Deutschland zu sein und können auf über ein Jahrzehnt erfolgreiche Präsenz auf dem Markt zurückblicken.

Unsere umfangreichen Kenntnisse und die Nutzung modernster Technologien ermöglichen es uns, selbst die schwierigsten Aufgaben in der Steinreinigung erfolgreich zu bewältigen. Ob es sich um historische Denkmäler oder Pflasterflächen handelt – wir bieten individuelle Lösungen für jedes Anliegen.

Unser Erfolg beruht maßgeblich auf unserem engagierten Team. Unsere Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter sind hochqualifiziert, erfahren und mit Leidenschaft bei der Arbeit. Ihr Know-how und ihre Hingabe sind entscheidend für unsere Position als einer der ersten Unternehmen in der Branche.

Wir ruhen uns jedoch nicht auf unseren Erfolgen aus, sondern streben kontinuierlich danach, unsere Dienstleistungen zu verbessern. Wir bleiben immer auf dem neuesten Stand der Technik, indem wir neue Verfahren erforschen und unser Team durch Schulungen und Weiterbildungen weiterentwickeln.

Für die Zukunft sind wir zuversichtlich und bereit, weiterhin einen wesentlichen Beitrag zur Pflege und Verschönerung von Steinflächen in ganz Deutschland zu leisten. Wir danken unseren Kunden für ihr Vertrauen und ihre Unterstützung und freuen uns darauf, ihre Erwartungen auch weiterhin zu erfüllen.

Esto te permite tener el control total de tu negocio y operaciones desde cualquier dispositivo, SIN INVERSION INICIAL NI PAGO DE INSTALACION Y CONFIGURACION

¿Qué soluciones brindamos?

Optimización de Atención al Cliente:
-Conteo en tiempo real: Controla el flujo de clientes por hora, día o mes, permitiendo una asignación precisa del personal en momentos de alta afluencia.
-Análisis de permanencia por sector: Conoce los tiempos de permanencia en cada área para optimizar recursos y ajustar horarios que potencien la facturación.
-Gestión de colas: Activa notificaciones automáticas cuando las filas superen un límite, mejorando la experiencia en atención al cliente.
-Control de presencia en puestos críticos: Supervisa posiciones clave, como recepción y cajas, recibiendo alertas en tiempo real para asegurar una operación fluida.

Control Operativo para Seguridad Integral:
-Supervisión de zonas restringidas: Monitorea el acceso a áreas sensibles y recibe alertas en caso de acceso no autorizado.
-Verificación de normas de seguridad: Asegura el cumplimiento de normativas con alertas sobre falta de equipo esencial.
-Reconocimiento facial y trazabilidad: Identifica personas en sectores específicos, asegurando un seguimiento detallado.

Control y Visibilidad Continua:
Monitoreo en tiempo real: Visualiza lo que sucede en tu negocio con cámaras de alta resolución y visión nocturna.
-Registro de actividad histórica: Revisa eventos anteriores con un historial que respalda tus operaciones.
-Audio bidireccional: Comunica en tiempo real a través del sistema.
-Privacidad garantizada: Solo tú y las personas designadas tienen acceso al monitoreo, protegiendo la confidencialidad de espacios

Description:
Carat est un centre de soins esthétiques pour automobiles et motos. 

Notre équipe est spécialisée dans la correction des défauts d'aspect de la carrosserie, dans la restauration de la sellerie, dans le nettoyage des habitacles. Tout ce qui rend les belles voitures encore plus belles.

Ce faisant, nous ajoutons de la valeur aux voitures de collection ou aux voitures de prestige.

Qu'il s'agisse de redonner du lustre à une carrosserie ternie par le temps ou de restaurer une sellerie ou un habitacle de plus de 50 ans, nous avons des solutions haut de gamme pour redonner un aspect neuf aux voitures et aux motos.

Nos clients viennent nous voir pour des volants, des sièges, des consoles centrales, des panneaux de portes, des tableaux de bords, des ciels de toit. Pour des selles de moto, des sièges de véhicule utilitaire et même de bateaux.

Ils viennent aussi nous voir pour supprimer les micro-rayures qui ternissent leur carrosserie et pour y appliquer un traitement céramique afin de la protéger. Ou bien encore pour poser l'ultime protection de carrosserie qu'est le film communément appelé PPF (Paint Protection Film).

Notre équipe est composée de personnes toutes passionnées d'automobile. Nous aimons beaucoup échanger avec nos clients sur telle ou telle caractéristique, telle ou telle finition, sur le châssis de tel modèle ou sur la dernière version d'un moteur mythique.

Nous les accompagnons dans leurs projets, de A à Z, y compris dans les cas où il faut faire appel à nos partenaires. Nous sommes un guichet unique de l'esthétique automobile et moto.

• A full and detailed CV

• Copies of identifications of which Burlington Nannies have seen originals of (i.e.Passport, Driving Licence, Birth Certificate.

• A minimum of two references supplied by previous employers that have also been verbal checked by Burlington Nannies

Name: NEXUS- Reach Us Ease Up
Description:
Finding workers for construction and repairing has been a challenge ever since. Festive season is the high time for these works and labours/workers demand exorbitant charges which is not justified. There’re also no fixed charges in this area along with the demand-supply issue. It is also very difficult to find the right guy for the job as there’s a communication gap. Also, it is observed that at the time of payment there’s a lot of bickering between the parties which in turn contributes to a bad customer experience.

Nexus is an on demand service platform that provides customers with reliable and high-quality services. It is a quick solution for people to their problems ranging from simply repairing a tap to design/construct a fully-fledged house. At present, people roam around cities or to the labor chowks in order to find skilled labor for their work. This is too much of a hassle, inconvenient as well as time-consuming. Apart from this, the situation is worse during festive seasons as many of the skilled labors are either not available or charge whatever they think is right and people are left with no other option. becomes quite difficult to find workers.

Nexus is designed to easily connect customers with workers, ensuring to overcome various hurdles that they face throughout. Through its unique business model, this venture seeks to bring revolution in this sector across the world.

Name: EC Life
Description:
EC Life erbjuder tjänster inom företagsservice och hemservice. Vår vision är att erbjuda dig och din arbetsplats en mer harmonisk vardag, så att du ska få ägna dig mer åt det du vill och att livet ska kännas lite enklare och bättre att leva.

Ett långsiktigt samarbete och varaktig kvalitet handlar först och främst om våra medarbetare.

Att de mår bra och trivs på sitt arbete är en förutsättning för att vi ska kunna leverera våra tjänster efter dina önskemål. Därför har vi kollektivavtal genom arbetsgivarorganisationen Almega som ser till att personalen har rätt försäkringar.

Kollektivavtalet försäkrar dig också om att vi inte underbetalar våra anställda och att de har rätt kompetens för att utföra tjänsterna på ett riktigt sätt.

ll vår personal utbildas kontinuerligt och då vi själva arrangerar städutbildning kan vi snabbt kompetensutveckla vår personal när behov uppstår.

För att säkerställa att vi håller hög kvalité arbetar vi hos många kunder med INSTA 800. INSTA 800 är en nordisk standard som används för mätning och utvärdering av städkvalitet framtagen i samarbete mellan köpare, branschorganisationer och fackliga organisationer.

Miljö
Vårt arbete ska utföras på ett för miljön hållbart sätt. Vi ser ständigt över våra rutiner och arbetar med förbättring. I det arbetet ingår följande:

-Att löpande se över arbetsrutiner och utförande
att aktivt välja miljövänlig transport till uppdrag. Vi förordar om möjligt kollektivtrafik.
-Att använda rengöringsmedel som är miljövänliga
att återanvända städredskap och utrustning i möjligaste mån
-Att minska förbrukning av kontorsmaterial och papper
att källsortera allt avfall
-Att använda återvinningsbara material
-Att utbilda personal i miljöfrågor som rör verksamheten
-Att erbjuda anställda branschutbildningar (SRY/PRYL)
-Att alltid följa kommunens regler och anvisningar för avfallshantering

EC life är en del av Einar Operating

Name: Seniorenbetreuung & Häusliche Dienste
Description:
So lange wie möglich in der vertrauten Umgebung wohnen: Kaum etwas verbessert das Wohlbefinden im Alter so sehr, wie das würdevolle Leben in seinen eigenen vier Wänden.

Dennoch kann dies zu einer Herausforderung werden und Unterstützung in der Häuslichkeit nötig sein. Menschen, die aufgrund von Alter, Krankheit oder anderen Umständen auf Betreuung angewiesen sind, stehen wir deshalb mit Herz und Zuwendung zur Seite.

Unsere Unterstützungsleistungen für private Haushalte umfassen zum einen die Begleitung bei alltäglichen Aufgaben und Erledigungen, aber auch haushaltsnahe Dienste, um beispielsweise den gewohnten Reinigungsstandard zu halten, wenn die eigene Kraft dafür nicht mehr reicht.

Mit unseren familienunterstützenden Diensten bieten wir vor allem betreuenden Angehörigen Entlastung und Flexibilität, indem die pflegebedürftige Person stundenweise durch uns umsorgt wird.

Unser breites Leistungsangebot haben wir darauf abgestimmt, das Leben von Senioren und Pflegebedürftigen zu erleichtern. Damit Aufgaben, die sie nicht mehr eigenständig durchführen können, nicht zur Einschränkung ihrer Lebensqualität führen.

Name: Krameda Alltagshilfe

Im Alltag Hilfe zu bekommen sollte keine Hürde sein. Und zu helfen darf einfach sein.
Krameda ist die Plattform, die beides möglich macht. Lokal, flexibel und fair.

Wir verbinden Menschen, die Unterstützung brauchen, mit Menschen, die gerne anpacken.
Ob Haushalt, Einkäufe, Begleitung zum Arzt, Gassigehen oder digitale Aufgaben wie Social Media oder IT. Wir schaffen echte Hilfe dort, wo sie gebraucht wird.

Was uns auszeichnet:

Einfach: Kein Papierkram, keine unnötigen Umwege. Alles läuft digital und klar geregelt
Lokal: Helferinnen und Helfer kommen aus der Umgebung und sind schnell zur Stelle
Fair: Transparente Bezahlung, gegenseitiger Respekt und ein System, das beide Seiten schützt
Vielfältig: Von Alltagshilfe über Gesellschaft bis hin zu digitaler Unterstützung. Hilfe ist, was gebraucht wird

Ob du Unterstützung für dich oder deine Familie suchst, dein Verein Hilfe bei Social Media braucht oder du selbst etwas Gutes tun möchtest. Bei Krameda findest du dein Match.

Weil Hilfe keine Frage des Glücks sein sollte, sondern nur eine Plattform entfernt.

Description:
Be clean
היא חברת ניקיון מובילה בישראל המציעה שירותי ניקיון ואחזקה לחברות ועסקים בעלי משרד בכל תחומי הארץ.
אנו מספקים שירותי ניקיון איכותיים הנתמכים על ידי עובדים מנוסים ואדיבים.

אנו מציעים מגוון רחב של פתרונות ניקיון המותאמים לצרכים הייחודיים של כל עסק ודרישתו הספציפית.

אנו מספקים שירותי נקיון לאורך כל שעות היום, בוקר צהריים ו/או ערב, הכל בהתאם לצרכים של המשרד שלכם, זאת בכדי למזער את ההפרעות לפעילות העסקית השוטפת של העסק.

מעבר לניקיון משרדים אנו מציעים שירותי ניקיון מבנים, בנייני משרדים, אולמות תצוגה, ניקיון לאחר שיפוץ וניקיון ראשוני לפני חניכת משרד חדש.

בין אם אתם זקוקים לשירות ניקיון יומי, שבועי או חודשי, אנו תמיד מוכנים לספק לכם את הפתרון הטוב ביותר העונה על הצרכים שלכם.

אנו מאמינים שההצלחה שלכם היא ההצלחה שלנו, ולכן אנו מחוייבים לספק שירותי ניקיון העולים על הציפיות שלכם.

אנו מבינים שכל עסק הוא ייחודי, ולכן אנו מקדישים את הזמן כדי להבין את צרכי הניקיון ולפתח תוכנית ניקיון מותאמת אישית העונה על הדרישות של הלקוח.

KLENI AB grundades 2020 genom att några personer i ledningsnivå inom några stora städbolag blev trötta på den klassiska städningen och avslutade hos sina arbetsgivare och startade KLENI AB tillsammans. Alla dessa personer var för sig i sin tur har varit verksamt i branschen minst 10 år och den längsta 40 år. Vår erfarenhet och framåtanda har varit den drivande faktorn att utveckla företaget till det KLENI är idag.

Vi lägger stor vikt vid att motivera och ta tillvara på våra medarbetares individuella erfarenheter och kompetenser. I våra uppdrag verkar vi som ett väl sammansvetsat lag tillsammans med våra leverantörer och underentreprenörer. När vi jobbar med större objekt utser vi en ansvarig som leder arbetsgruppen med syftet att vår kvalitetssäkringsplan uppnås och garanteras. Vi genomgår kontinuerligt utbildningar där kompetensnivån höjs för att på rätt sätt driva och utveckla företaget framåt. I vår fin svetsade ledning har vi personer som är diplomerade SRY utbildare samt går hela tiden kontinuerliga utbildningar både hos Almega samt SRY och de för dessa vidare till våra medarbetare genom kontinuerliga utbildningar inom all område från golvvård till sanering samt ett hållbar arbete.

Thus, LifeSenser was conceived—not merely as a brand but as a harbinger of a life lived fully and mindfully. Our ethos is simple: to guide you back to the essence of living, to unveil the splendor hidden in the mundane, and to lighten the load of life's burdens.

Our belief is that the magic of life sparkles in the minutiae. With a global team enriching our designs with their diverse cultures, we craft home products that aren’t just objects but carriers of joy and peace. From the soothing embrace of our scented candles to the cheerful presence of our decor, LifeSenser is about creating those pockets of serenity that make life truly beautiful.

Join us at LifeSenser, where we don’t just navigate life—we celebrate it, one heartfelt moment at a time.

Description:
EARTHWISE BRASIL LIMITADA

BIOTRAPS BRASIL

Salvar vidas da ameaça mortal de doenças transmitidas por mosquitos – esse é o cerne da nossa missão na Biotraps. Imaginamos um mundo onde as famílias não precisam mais temer doenças como Dengue, Zika e Febre Amarela.

Fundada em 2016, a Biotraps começou com a criação do primeiro mata-mosquitos compostável do mundo, desenvolvido em parceria com a Equipe de Resposta à Ação contra a Dengue na Austrália. Inicialmente focada nos mosquitos Aedes, nosso trabalho agora ajuda a proteger comunidades globalmente de uma ampla variedade de doenças transmitidas por mosquitos.

O que torna a Biotraps única é o nosso compromisso com as pessoas e o meio ambiente. Nossas armadilhas são ecologicamente responsáveis, acessíveis e oferecem uma solução duradoura para o controle de mosquitos, projetadas para minimizar o impacto nos ecossistemas. Com a Biotraps, não estamos apenas eliminando mosquitos – estamos construindo comunidades mais saudáveis e seguras.

Name: Mopberry LLC
Description:
I wouldn’t trade my kids for anything, but sometimes I wish I could sleep in till, like, I don’t know—5:30 AM, maybe? If you’re reading this, I’ll bet you know exactly what I’m talking about. Kids or no kids—most of us have to stretch our days a lot more than we want to. And, I don’t know about you, but if I get a spare 30 minutes, I’m not vacuuming. I’m sleeping. Full stop.

So, can you clean your own home or office? Yes, of course. But, I’ll bet you could also knit a sweater out of cat fur if you put your mind to it. Life is short. You deserve to live in a clean home and work in a clean office. You are worthy, friend.

But, that’s not the only reason I started Mopberry. There are a lot of moms out there who are trying to make ends meet while skating figure eights around their kids’ schedules. Mopberry provides those moms with a platform to schedule their own jobs, at their own pace—just like ride-sharing companies. Our cleaning partners earn money for their families on a schedule that allows them to see their families. We call that a win-win.

Sure, you can hire a cleaning company with exhausted, stressed-out workers, trying to juggle dentist appointments, soccer practice, and dinner between the hours of 5:30 and 6 pm. Or, you can hire a company that empowers women to do right by both your family and theirs. And, guess who does a better job cleaning? We do.

Welcome to Mopberry. We’ve got this.

Name: Earthwise Manufacturing Inc.
Description:
EARTHWISE MANUFACTURING INC.

Saving lives through sustainable, science-based innovation—that's the heart of our mission at Earthwise. We envision a world where families no longer fear diseases transmitted by insects like mosquitoes.

Our first products, Biotraps and Aedes Mosquito Killers, are the world’s first biodegradable mosquito eradication devices, developed in partnership with the Dengue Action Response Team in Queensland, Australia. Extensive research, development and trials have been conducted across 6 continents to establish the strength of the products against all genera of mosquitoes. Our most extensive trials were conducted in the Amazon region of Brazil, possibly the most rugged environment to prove efficacy.

What makes Earthwise unique is our commitment to both people and the environment. Our products are environmentally conscious, affordable, and offer a lasting solution for mosquito control, designed to minimize impact on ecosystems. We’re not just killing mosquitoes—we’re working to build healthier, safer communities.

Description:
Nokikaveri on valtakunnallinen nuohouspalvelu, joka tarjoaa kattavia ja luotettavia palveluita ympäri Suomen. Yrityksemme työllistää eri alueilla pitkään toimineita, ammattitutkinnon suorittaneita nuohoojia, jotka huolehtivat asiakastyytyväisyydestä ja turvallisuudesta. Voit varata yksittäisen nuohouksen tai valita hoitosopimuksen, joka pitää huolen siitä, että vuosittaiset nuohoukset tulevat hoidettua luotettavasti ajallaan.

Nokikaverin ammattilaiset noudattavat Nuohousalan Keskusliiton nuohoustyöohjetta ja työ tehdään aina korkeiden laatu- ja turvallisuusstandardien mukaisesti.

Tavoitteenamme on kantaa vastuuta yhteiskunnassa turvallisuusalan toimijana ja varmistaa, että jokaisella suomalaisella on helppo ja vaivaton mahdollisuus hoitaa pelastuslain vaatima nuohousvelvoite.

Anna meidän huolehtia nuohouksestasi – varaa aika helposti verkkosivuiltamme!

Oavsett om det gäller en liten lägenhetsflytt eller en större företagsflytt, är vårt mål att leverera kvalitet och effektivitet i varje steg.

Säkerhet är en av våra högsta prioriteringar. Vi tar hand om dina tillhörigheter med försiktighet och använder beprövade metoder för att säkerställa att allt kommer fram i samma skick som det lämnades. Dessutom är vi fullt försäkrade, vilket ger dig 100% trygghet. Vi tror även starkt på transparenta och konkurrenskraftiga priser. Med 100% Flytt finns inga dolda avgifter eller oväntade kostnader utan du kan förvänta dig ärlighet i allra högsta grad.

Name: TaskBuddy
Description:
Stell dir vor, du bist 76 Jahre alt. Die Glühbirne im Flur ist durchgebrannt, der Garten gleicht einem Dschungel, und die Nachbarin von früher ist weggezogen. Du weißt genau, was zu tun ist. Du weißt nur nicht mehr, wen du fragen sollst.
Genau hier beginnt TaskBuddy.
Wir haben mit Senioren gesprochen. Stundenlang zugehört. Und verstanden, dass Einsamkeit nicht bedeutet, keine Familie zu haben. Einsamkeit beginnt, wenn die alltäglichen Berührungspunkte fehlen. Der Plausch mit dem Handwerker. Das kurze Gespräch mit jemandem, der zum Fensterputzen kommt. Die Gewissheit, dass jemand nach einem schaut.
TaskBuddy verbindet Menschen. Ein einfacher Anruf genügt, und wir organisieren zuverlässige Hilfe im Haushalt. Keine Apps, keine digitalen Hürden. Nur menschliche Verbindung.
Aber wir vermitteln nicht nur Dienstleistungen. Wir schaffen Begegnungen zwischen Generationen, die sich sonst nie getroffen hätten. Wir bringen zurück, was wir als Gesellschaft verloren haben: echte Nachbarschaft. Das Gefühl, nicht allein zu sein mit den kleinen und großen Herausforderungen des Alltags.
Studien zeigen, dass chronische Einsamkeit so schädlich ist wie 15 Zigaretten am Tag. TaskBuddy ist unsere Antwort darauf - nicht mit erhobenem Zeigefinger, sondern mit ausgestreckter Hand.
Technologie sollte Menschen verbinden, nicht ausschließen. Innovation sollte einfacher machen, nicht komplizierter. Und Hilfe sollte immer nur einen Anruf entfernt sein.
Wir sind für Sie da.

Name: 24-Domestic.Com
Description:
24-Domestic.Com , Respected Agency Who provides a comprehensive range of domestic staffing solutions tailored for private households. Their services are primarily focused on providing 24-hour live-in staff to assist with all aspects of home management. 
Core Domestic Service Offerings
The agency provides specialized staff across several categories:
Maid & Housekeeping Services: Includes daily sweeping, mopping, dusting, vacuuming, and cleaning surfaces. Maids also handle laundry (washing and ironing) and general organization of the home.
Childcare & Babysitting: Experienced nannies and babysitters for newborn care and managing the daily routines, safety, and playtime of toddlers and older children.
Japa Maid Services: Specialized postpartum care for both the mother and the newborn, typically covering the first 90 days to 6 months after delivery.
Cooking Services: Skilled cooks who manage grocery shopping, meal planning, and daily meal preparation for the entire family.
Elderly & Patient Care: Compassionate caregivers for seniors or recovering patients, assisting with daily living activities, medication management, and hygiene.
All-Rounder Staff: General helpers capable of performing multiple domestic tasks, including cleaning, kitchen help, and running errands. 
Key Operational Features (2025)
Verified Staff: The agency claims to conduct rigorous background checks, including Aadhar verification and Police Clearance Certificates (PCC).
Pan-India Service: While headquartered in Delhi-NCR, they provide domestic help services across major Indian cities.
Replacement Guarantee: Contracts typically include a provision to replace a domestic helper if they are not a suitable match for the household.
Placement Fees: As a placement agency, they charge a one-time or subscription fee for matching employers with candidates, separate from the worker's monthly salary.

Name: فني كهربائي بجدة الافضل في جدة ٠٥٤٠٤٨٧٧٨١ - خصم ٢٥٪ علي اعمال الكهرباء - السباكة - الدهانات في جدة
Description:
في مدينة جدة النابضة بالحياة، البحث عن أفضل فني كهرباء منازل ليس مجرد ضرورة، بل أولوية للسلام النفسي. نحن هنا لنقدم الحلول بكفاءة ودقة. ففريقنا يتميز بالتميز في خدمات الكهرباء بجدة. سواء كانت مشكلة في الإنارة أو أي عطل كهربائي آخر، فإن فنيينا ماهرون ومتخصصون في صيانة اعطال الكهرباء بجدة. نحن نضمن الحلول السريعة والموثوقة لأي مشكلة كهربائية. بخبرتنا الطويلة، اكتسبنا سمعة الاعتماد في الخدمات الكهربائية بجدة. لا تدع المشاكل الكهربائية تعكر صفو حياتك، اعتمد على فريقنا للحصول على خدمة عالية الجودة. راحتك وسلامتك هي أولويتنا، فثق بأنك في أيدي أفضل فنيي الكهرباء بجدة.








إذا كنت تبحث عن فني كهربائي محترف وماهر في مدينة جدة لتركيب وصيانة المنازل والشقق، فإن البحث قد انتهى. تمثل مدينة جدة واحدة من أكبر المدن في المملكة العربية السعودية، وتضم العديد من الأماكن السكنية والتجارية والصناعية، وبالتأكيد هناك الكثير من الاحتياج للخدمات الكهربائية الفعالة والجودة.

يُعَدّ فني الكهرباء في جدة أحد العاملين المهمين والأساسيين للحفاظ على سلامة المباني والمنازل وتأمين استدامة التيار الكهربائي فيها. إليه تُثقُل مسؤوليّة تركيب وصيانة الأسلاك والأجهزة الكهربائية للمنازل والشقق بطريقة صحيحة ومضمونة.
ما يميز فني الكهرباء في جدة هو خبرته الواسعة في هذا المجال ومعرفته الشاملة بأحدث التقنيات والأدوات الكهربائية. بغض النظر عن حجم أو نوع العمل الكهربائي الذي تحتاج إليه، فإنه سيقوم بتوفير الخدمة المثلى وبمهنية عالية.

فني الكهرباء في جدة يقوم بتركيب وصيانة مختلف الأجهزة والمعدات الكهربائية في المنازل والشقق، مثل الإضاءة، والمآخذ، والمفاتيح الكهربائية، والتكييف، والمروحة، والأجهزة الكهربائية الأخرى. كما يقوم بفحص الدوائر الكهربائية لضمان عملها بشكل صحيح والتأكد من عدم وجود أي مشاكل أو أعطال.

Name: Samantha CORDEMANS-THERAPEUTE
Description:
La thérapie que je vous propose se base sur l'approche de la psychothérapie intégrative. Elle vise dans l'instant présent à accueillir ce qui se présente pour vous sans jugement, l'écouter et l'explorer en conscience et en sécurité.

La psychothérapie intégrative considère l'humain de manière globale, dans toutes ses dimensions : physique, émotionnelle, mentale, sociale, énergétique, spirituelle et de pleine conscience.

En fonction du contexte, de la pathologie et des problèmes du patient, la psychothérapie intègre un choix de thérapies différentes. Ces thérapies sont basées sur les travaux de :

L’Analyse transactionnelle d’Eric Berne
L’approche centrée sur la personne (ACP) de Carl Rogers
La Gestalt-thérapie de Fritz Perls
La Psychanalyse humaniste

Les idées préliminaires de la psychothérapie intégrative ont été présentées pour la première fois par Richard Erskine.

Name: Caplife
Description:
Apres +15 ans à travailler dans une organisation qui m’a vu franchir les palliers passant de commercial, à manager, à Vice Président et voyant évoluer une société passer de 30 à près de 600 employés, j’ai eu la chance:
- d’être bien entouré
- de côtoyer de merveilleuses personnes (collaborateurs & amis, partenaires, clients)
- d’avoir de formidables managers
Et
- de connaître le passage d’un management familial à un management financier (la société ayant été rachetée par 4 fonds d’investissements en moins de 7 ans)

Après 15 ans j’ai décidé d’arrêter ne me reconnaissant plus dans les valeurs que la société prônait.

J’accompagne aujourd’hui des sociétés comme conseiller pour le développement commercial de leurs activités quand je ressens un management humain.

Mais après 3 années à me « former à la vie » et accompagné d’une psychiatre de renom, j’entame un nouveau chapitre de ma vie en proposant mes services aux personnes en tant que « Coach de Vie ».

Je n’ai pas la prétention d’être psychologue ou thérapeute, je n’en ai pas les diplômes nécessaires.

Mais j’ai développé une méthodologie que j’appellerais une logique mathématico émotionnelle, qui me permet d’accompagner quiconque faisant appel à moi avec une seule ambition : tenter de vous aider à vous sentir plus épanoui.

Ma méthodologie n’est pas brevetée, et je suis prêt à la partager avec toute personne qui viendra vers moi ayant la démarche ouverte de vouloir se sentir aider, accompagner, guider, pour se sentir plus heureux, et apprendre à s’autogérer par la suite.

Alors n’hésitez pas à me contacter si vous en ressentez le besoin

Cordialement

Jean-Baptiste Vandeginste

Name: STRAUER
Description:
STRAUER - Spezialreinigung für Ihre Solaranlage

Möchten Sie die Effizienz Ihrer Solarstromanlage maximieren? STRAUER ist Ihr Partner, wenn es um die professionelle Reinigung Ihrer Solarpanels geht. Wir helfen, die Leistung und Lebensdauer Ihrer Solaranlage zu optimieren.

Unser Ansatz:
STRAUER bietet maßgeschneiderte Reinigungsdienste, die perfekt auf Ihre Solaranlage abgestimmt sind. Unser qualifiziertes Team nutzt umweltfreundliche Reinigungsmethoden, um sicherzustellen, dass Ihre Panels effizient arbeiten – ganz ohne die Umwelt zu belasten.

Warum ist Photovoltaik-Reinigung wichtig?
Staub, Schmutz, Pollen und andere Verunreinigungen beeinträchtigen die Leistung von Solarpanels. Studien zeigen, dass eine regelmäßige Reinigung die Energieausbeute um bis zu 20 % steigern kann!

SolarDach-Flächen:
Bei Solaranlagen auf Wohngebäuden sorgt regelmäßige Reinigung für eine optimale Energieerzeugung. Ablagerungen wie Staub und Schmutz können die Effizienz erheblich mindern. Unsere schonende Reinigung entfernt diese Verunreinigungen nachhaltig und ohne Schäden an den Modulen, damit Ihre Solaranlage immer mit maximaler Leistung arbeitet.

Solarfrei-Flächen & Parks:
In großen Solarparks, die oft starken Staubbelastungen und Verschmutzungen ausgesetzt sind, ist eine regelmäßige Reinigung entscheidend für den nachhaltigen Betrieb. Besonders in industriellen Gebieten oder in der Nähe von Autobahnen können Ablagerungen die Leistung erheblich reduzieren. Eine Reinigung alle 2-3 Jahre hilft, die Energieproduktion um bis zu 20 % zu steigern.

Thermografie:
Mit Thermografie können wir Temperaturunterschiede auf den Solarmodulen sichtbar machen, die auf Defekte oder unregelmäßige Leistung hinweisen. Dadurch können wir frühzeitig Probleme identifizieren und gezielte Wartungsmaßnahmen ergreifen, um die Lebensdauer und Energieausbeute der Anlage zu maximieren.

Vertrauen Sie auf STRAUER für eine nachhaltige und leistungsstarke Pflege Ihrer Solaranlage.

L'objectif de ce travail est d'apporter une hygiène du corps pour prévenir des blessures, améliorer la mobilité des articulations et surtout que le muscle développe une densité souple.
Cet ensemble d’exercices se fait dans le respect et l'écoute des besoins de chaque élève.
Les gammes de postures se font dans la détente et le relâchement des muscles en position « statique ». Avec douceur et lenteur, le corps entre dans les postures, prenant le temps de bien respirer, les muscles se délient progressivement.

تعتبر شركة كشف تسربات المياه بالرياض إحدى الشركات الرائدة في هذا المجال، وتقدم خدماتها الفعالة والمتخصصة للعملاء في المنطقة. تعمل الشركة على تقديم خدمات متنوعة ومتكاملة للكشف عن تسربات المياه وتحديد أسبابها وإصلاحها باستخدام أحدث التقنيات والأدوات المتاحة في السوق. تعتمد الشركة على فريق من الخبراء والفنيين المؤهلين وذوي الخبرة في هذا المجال، والذين يتمتعون بالمهارات والخبرة اللازمة لتقديم خدمات عالية الجودة للعملاء.

تقدم الشركة خدماتها لجميع أنواع المباني والمنشآت، بما في ذلك المنازل السكنية والمباني التجارية والمستشفيات والمدارس والمصانع والفنادق والمراكز التجارية وغيرها. تعتمد الشركة على أحدث الأجهزة والتقنيات للكشف عن تسربات المياه، بما في ذلك أجهزة الكشف بالأشعة تحت الحمراء والتقنيات الحرارية وأجهزة الكشف عن الموجات الصوتية، والتي تمكن الفريق من تحديد موقع التسربات بدقة .

Name: Slick Barrier
Description: Slick Barrier is an innovative pest control solution designed to physically stops insects and rodents from entering homes and other structures without using pesticides. Slick Barrier is a clear coating applied to the exterior base of a home or a few inches above the ground. Drying to a smooth, glass-like finish, Slick Barrier prevents pests from gripping or gaining a foothold, rendering climbing impossible.  If pests cannot climb, they can no longer get into homes or structures.  With three (3) patents securing exclusive rights to this pest control method, Slick Barrier gained recognition on ABC's Shark Tank in January 2023, receiving an offer from Lori Greiner. Currently available at Home Depot in Arizona and Texas, this safe product has undergone successful testing at three universities, with many pest control companies now offering it to customers.  Slick Barrier also offers a range of other pesticide-free products that are affordable, one-time use and easy to apply.  Slick Barrier works on scorpions, bed bugs, rodents, crickets, cockroaches, spiders, ants and any other crawling pest.

Name: Jørgensen og Svendsen Vinduespolering I/S
Description:
Jørgensen og Svendsen Vinduespolering I/S er et vinduespudsningsfirma der kører i hele Nordsjælland, København omegn og dele af Midtsjælland.

Virksomheden består af direktør og vinduespudser Stinus Arthur Juhl Svendsen og underdirektør og vinduespudser Aksel Mosegaard Jørgensen.

Virksomhedens formål er at hjælpe travle familier, ældre mennesker, små og større virksomheder med butiksfacader, samt mellemstore og store virksomheder med kontorbygninger.

Vi er en atypisk vinduespudsningvirksomhed, da vi tager imod mange opgaver som andre vinduespudsere ville afvise. Vi lægger vægt på at kunne hjælpe alle slags kunder, også dem med arkitekttegnede huse og høje gavlvinduer.
Så tøv ikke med at kontakte os på +45 60 65 29 90, hvis du bor i en atypisk bolig.

Virksomheden blev startet den 1. April 2023, af Stinus Arthur juhl Svendsen og Aksel Mosegaard Jørgensen, der begge stadig er i virksomheden.
På de første 4 måneder har virksomheden hjulpet over 90 forskellige kunder (både B2C og B2B), hvoraf over 33% har valgt at få abonnement.

Jørgensen og Svendsen vinduespolering har dags-dato aldrig modtaget en anmeldelse på under 5-stjener.

Wenn ein Haushaltsgerät kaputt ist, lässt sich der Schaden oft reparieren, statt das Gerät zu entsorgen. Gerade bei Einbaugeräten entfällt dann die langwierige Suche nach passendem Ersatz. Man braucht für die fachmännische Reparatur nur einen guten Partner. Unser Meisterbetrieb mit Standorten in Berlin und Umland repariert Ihre Elektrogeräte fachkundig, schnell und zuverlässig. Nach der Reparatur funktioniert das Gerät noch einige Jahre, was nachhaltig ist und hilft, Müllberge zu reduzieren.

Wir wissen, wie kompliziert die Entsorgung von Altgeräten ist und bieten diesen Service selbstverständlich mit an. Unser Service ist aufgrund von Wiederherstellung alter Geräte umweltfreundlich und klimaneutral. Hiring a house clearance company isn’t always an easy task. There’s the exhausting process of researching companies, getting and comparing quotes, choosing the right company for you, hoping that the chosen company turn up on time and act in a professional manner, then leave the house tidy and have not caused any damage to your property.

Some companies will also double the quote due to excesses and other hidden charges upon billing. Overall getting your house cleared isn’t always an enjoyable experience.

That’s where Our House Clearance can help, by providing a reliable and expert service to all our customers that you can trust. 

Our system for dealing with a clearance is built on simplicity, efficiency and low effort for our customers. 

Affordability is also very important to us. A skip hire in the Suffolk area can range between £200-£350 a week for a 4-yard skip, which only holds approximately 40 black bin bags of waste, and bulky item (sofas, tables, washing machines etc) collection by the local council starts at £25 per item.

These are not always the most cost effective ways to remove everything from a property, so speak to us today to find out what we can do for you. We regularly have promotional offers on so keep your eye out for them.

Building relationships one house at a time.

When you chose Declutterology to help you organise and declutter your home, you will not only find the process so much quicker than if you tried to do it all on your own, but it is also infinitely more effective.

I give you mechanisms to put in place so that organising, and decluttering becomes a positive and recurring part of your life without you having to stress about it. 

Areas I cover:
•	Home office space – declutter and release overwhelm with paperwork & disorganisation to improve productivity, efficiency, and focus.
•	Declutter to help mental health – overwhelm, anxiety & depression
•	Peri-Menopausal & Menopausal women - The mental symptoms that affect women going through Perimenopause and Menopause can change life dramatically, from anxiety to brain fog and mood swings. On top of all that the clutter in the house that once you could cope with now leads to frustration, stress, overwhelm and quite honestly at times utter despair. 
•	You want to be organised and live in a clutter-free space, but you don’t have the time or don’t know where or how to even begin.
•	Downsizing/Upsizing Movers – saving you money on moving costs
•	Transitions in life - Bereavement, Transgender declutter, expecting a baby or growing families, Empty Nesters – make room.

Name: NeuroClean
Description:
NeuroClean | Cleaning with Care, Changing the Narrative

NeuroClean isn’t just a cleaning service—it’s a movement.

We offer professional domestic cleaning with a difference, blending practical, person-centred support with purpose-driven values. Founded by a neurodivergent cleaner with lived experience of addiction, homelessness, and mental health challenges, NeuroClean was built to break the mold of traditional cleaning businesses.

We provide:
- Standard & Deep Domestic Cleaning
- One-Off Room Resets
- Hoarding & Hazard-Aware Cleans
- Supportive Cleans for Neurodivergent Clients
- Education Around Accessible Living Spaces
- Judgment-Free Service for People in Recovery or Transition

Our approach is innovative, trauma-informed, and inclusive. We believe cleaning shouldn’t be a barrier—it should be a bridge. That's why we prioritize understanding, flexibility, and dignity in everything we do. Whether you're overwhelmed, navigating a life transition, or just need a fresh start, we clean with empathy, not judgment.

NeuroClean puts people over profit. We actively engage in community outreach, collaborate with local charities, and expand our services for free to those in need. We also use our platform to educate others about neurodivergence, addiction recovery, mental health, and accessible living.

We’re not here to just tidy up—we’re here to help people reset, rebuild, and reclaim their spaces with support and respect.

If you believe in cleaning that cares, services that support, and business done differently—NeuroClean is for you.

Name: Mr. Appliance of Brenham and Bryan/College Station, TX
Description:
Mr. Appliance of Katy provides full-service residential and commercial appliance care across Katy and nearby communities. Their core offering is in-home troubleshooting, diagnosis, and repair for the major appliances that keep kitchens and laundry rooms running. Services include refrigerator and freezer repair (cooling problems, ice maker issues, leaks), washer and dryer repair for mechanical or electrical faults, dishwasher repair for cleaning, drainage, or leaking issues, and cooking-appliance repair for ovens, stoves, ranges, and cooktops. They also help with other common household units such as microwaves, garbage disposals, and specialty refrigeration, and they service most major brands. 

For businesses, Mr. Appliance of Katy offers commercial appliance repair for restaurants, laundromats, offices, and property managers. They work on high-use units and can schedule visits around business hours to reduce downtime and disruption. 

Beyond fixing breakdowns, they support preventative care. Dryer vent cleaning helps reduce fire risk and improve dryer efficiency, while their Appliance Wellness Program and maintenance plans are designed to extend appliance life and catch small problems early. 
Customers can schedule service online or by phone, receive transparent upfront pricing instead of hourly surprises, and expect punctual, uniformed professionals who protect floors and work areas. They aim for quick turnaround, use high-quality parts, and explain repairs plus simple care tips before they leave. All labor and parts are backed by the Neighborly “Done Right Promise,” including a one-year guarantee on parts and workmanship. 

In short, Mr. Appliance of Katy is a one-stop local partner for reliable repair, cleaning, and maintenance of the appliances you depend on every day—at home or at work.

Vi vill underlätta din vardag – oavsett var du befinner dig i livet

Vi heter Marion och Matias, och tillsammans driver vi vårt företag här i Vörå. Sedan 2023 har vi hjälpt människor att få vardagen att flyta smidigare, oavsett om det handlar om ett skinande rent hem eller teknik som bara ska fungera.

Vi är också en stor nyfamilj med barn i behov av särskilt stöd, vilket har gett oss en djup förståelse för hur värdefull hjälp i vardagen kan vara. Livet ser olika ut för alla, och vi vill finnas här för dig, oavsett situation.

Marion tar hand om städningen – med noggrannhet och omtanke ser hon till att ditt hem eller din arbetsplats känns fräsch och inbjudande. Matias ser till att din teknik samarbetar med dig istället för att ställa till problem, vare sig det handlar om hemelektronik eller IT-support.

Vi utgår från Vörå men arbetar också i Vasa, Nykarleby, Korsholm och andra orter enligt överenskommelse. Behöver du hjälp en gång eller löpande? Hör av dig så ser vi vad vi kan göra för dig!

Name: Transitions Made Simple
Description:
Transitions Made Simple was founded on the belief that change doesn’t need to be hectic, and transitioning to a new living situation can be done in an organized and thoughtful manner. We approach relocating and downsizing in a strategic way, ensuring all details are planned so our clients can focus on what’s important. We make what is typically a stressful and chaotic time in someone’s life as simple and structured as possible. Trust us to handle the details so you don’t have to worry!

Transitions Made Simple provides a comprehensive package of services to uniquely meet our client’s needs, including:
- Development of an overall move or "age in place" plan 
- Organization, sorting, & downsizing of client’s belongings 
- Creation of customized floor plans to meet our client's unique space needs 
- Arrangement for the profitable disposal of unwanted items through auction, estate sale, consignment, & donation
- Complete oversight of the moving company, including scheduling & interviewing on behalf of our clients 
- Arrangements for shipments & storage 
- Professional packing services 
- Unpacking & setting up the new home to ensure our clients feel settled immediately 
- Coordination of related vendor services on our client's behalf (cleaning, waste removal, shopping, & assisting with the selection of a realtor or home service vendor)
- Coordination & oversight of home projects/renovations
- Light staging services to prepare the client’s home for an upcoming sale

Name: Taskm8 | Finding home help made easy
Description:
What is Taskm8?

The ability to find reliable and cost-effective support for “unskilled” work within the home and local community can prove to be a real difficulty. Some many channels and platforms will provide a solution for the services of a skilled electrician or plumber, a builder, or a gas engineer. If, however, you require to locate services for general tasks that do not require any practical skillset (unskilled work), or to obtain help and support for a local or national charity organisation in which you are involved; or even to find companionship as you are lonely, housebound, or restricted by some form of disability, then the options are not so readily available. Often the lack of needed support or a reliable solution means that these tasks are either left undone or completed by a family member, neighbour or at an unacceptable cost. 

By Identifying a mate to provide a solution for a task, "a taskm8," a satisfactory and mutually beneficial outcome can be established at both ends of this equation. taskm8 has been launched to provide an easily accessible platform that enables individuals, community helpers, charities, and support groups to quickly and simply identify a solution for the completion of unskilled, often non-urgent tasks, at a price that meets "their own" budgets.

This same platform also allows individuals seeking additional income an easily accessed listing of potential opportunities in a desired geographical location, within their preferred area of activity and on a totally time flexible basis. 

Anyone wishing to have a task completed is identified within the process as a "tasker." Those wishing to complete the task to generate income are identified as the mate or m8. The combination of this mutual requirement is captured in the term taskm8.

Name: Kvalitetshem
Description:
Kvalitetshem, grundat 2008, är Gotlands främsta leverantör av servicetjänster, med fokus på branschutveckling och medarbetarvillkor. Företaget har engagerat sig i branschorganisationer som Kungliga Ingenjörsvetenskapsakademin och Prins Daniels Fellowship, för att bidra till branschens framsteg. Kvalitetshem har uppmärksammats med utmärkelser som ”Guldklövern” och ”Det Goda Exemplet” för sina insatser.

Företaget står ut genom att alla tillsvidareanställda har PRYL-Certifikat, den högsta utbildningen inom städbranschen. Med cirka 25 anställda, som fördubblas under sommaren, är vi baserade i egna lokaler i Visby.

Trygghet för kunder är en prioritet. Personalen bär uniform, har fotolegitimation, och har genomgått bakgrundskontroller. En omfattande introduktion säkerställer hög kompetens, och alla tillsvidareanställda har avslutat PRYL-städutbildningen. Kvalitetshem är även försäkrat mot skador relaterade till verksamheten eller produkter.

Företaget följer Almegas lönevillkor, vilket garanterar rättvisa löner och arbetsförhållanden. Kvalitetshem är även miljö- och kvalitetsmedvetna, verksamma enligt ISO14001 och ISO9001. Unikt är att vi är det enda gotländska företaget certifierat enligt INSTA800, en nordisk standard för renlighet.

Kvalitetshem symboliserar kvalitet och ansvar, och strävar efter att ständigt höja branschstandarden.

Name: شركة قمة المشاريع للخدمات المنزلية
Description:
عند البحث عن الخدمات لا يمكن التنازل عن أفضل مؤسسة خدمات متكاملة التي يمكن أن توفر لنا عشرات الخدمات بمجرد اتصال هاتفي واحد فقط.

مؤسسة قمة المشاريع والخدمات
تعد الخدمات المقدمة من قمة المشاريع للمقاولات العامة هي أفضل و أجود منظومة خدمية حيث تعبر بسهولة عن أفضل مؤسسة خدمات متكاملة تعمل بالمملكة فلديها خبرة تمتد لأعوام في العمل المجتمعي والخدمي.

فاستطاعت مؤسسة قمة المشاريع خلال عقود تطوير أفضل منظومة تعاون مشتركة بين المؤسسات الأهلية والحكومية لتوفير جميع الخدمات بأسلوب غير مسبوق في الجودة العالية والمهارة التي انعكست على أداء فرق العمل واستطوعوا بسهولة التكيف مع أفضل مؤسسة خدمات متكاملة.

الخبرة والكفاءة
هل تصورت في يوم ما أنك ستجد مؤسسة واحدة تجمع بين الخبرة والكفاءة في تنفيذ المهام بسهولة فائقة؟

تعد مؤسسة قمة المشاريع للخدمات والمقاولات العامة أول من استطاع الجمع بين الخبرة التامة والمهارة الفائقة لتنفيذ الأعمال الموكلة إليها بكفاءة تامة.

لهذا يمكنك عند التواصل مع مؤسسة قمة المشاريع الايقان أنك ستحصل على أفضل خدمة احترافية متكاملة من مؤسسة معتمدة وموثقة تعمل باحتراف ومهارة في المملكة العربية السعودية.

الأيدي العاملة
تعد الأيدي العاملة في مؤسسة قمة المشاريع للخدمات المنزلية والمقاولات من أفضل وأمهر اعمالة المتخصصة على كل من الصعيدين الهندسي والفني, فكل من فرقق المهندسين والفنيين العاملين بمؤسسة قمة المشاريع للخدمات المنزلية هم الأفضل على الاطلاق من ناحية الخبرة والمهارات التي تؤهلهم للعمل بجميع المناطق بالمملكة وتحت أي ظرف من الضغوط التي قد تقابلهم في العمل.

خدمات العملاء
تعد أنظمة الخدمة المهنية والفنية المقدمة من مؤسسة قمة المشاريع هي الأفضل على الاطلاق, ومما جعلها أفضل مؤسسة خدمات متكاملة هو نظام خدمة العملاء الذي يتسم بالشفافية والمهارة التامة والقدرة على التواصل الأجتماعي.

كما توفر مؤسسة قمة المشاريع للخدمات والمقاولات العامة أفضل مؤسسة خدمات متكاملة نظام اتصال عام يتسم بالسرعة والتلقائية, حيث توفر خطوط مباشرة للتواصل مع العملاء والرد على استفساراتهم.

Name: Mr. Appliance of Richmond TX
Description:
Mr. Appliance of Katy provides full-service residential and commercial appliance care across Katy and nearby communities. Their core offering is in-home troubleshooting, diagnosis, and repair for the major appliances that keep kitchens and laundry rooms running. Services include refrigerator and freezer repair (cooling problems, ice maker issues, leaks), washer and dryer repair for mechanical or electrical faults, dishwasher repair for cleaning, drainage, or leaking issues, and cooking-appliance repair for ovens, stoves, ranges, and cooktops. They also help with other common household units such as microwaves, garbage disposals, and specialty refrigeration, and they service most major brands. 

For businesses, Mr. Appliance of Katy offers commercial appliance repair for restaurants, laundromats, offices, and property managers. They work on high-use units and can schedule visits around business hours to reduce downtime and disruption. 

Beyond fixing breakdowns, they support preventative care. Dryer vent cleaning helps reduce fire risk and improve dryer efficiency, while their Appliance Wellness Program and maintenance plans are designed to extend appliance life and catch small problems early. 
Customers can schedule service online or by phone, receive transparent upfront pricing instead of hourly surprises, and expect punctual, uniformed professionals who protect floors and work areas. They aim for quick turnaround, use high-quality parts, and explain repairs plus simple care tips before they leave. All labor and parts are backed by the Neighborly “Done Right Promise,” including a one-year guarantee on parts and workmanship. 

In short, Mr. Appliance of Katy is a one-stop local partner for reliable repair, cleaning, and maintenance of the appliances you depend on every day—at home or at work.

This business was started by myself, Andrea Acton, out of my own need for a good cleaner.  I was a stay at home Mother with four kids. The eldest of my children was born with a severe disability and due to this also had a compromised immune system.  When he was able to be living at home with us, we needed the extra assistance of having in-home cleaners to help keep our home as clean as possible. Due to him being medically fragile, I found myself still cleaning and sanitizing even after the cleaners had been to visit. After my eldest son passed away, I wanted to start a business that would allow me to provide the level of cleanliness that families need in situations that were similar to mine.  I wanted to provide them an Immaculate Home.
Over time our business has expanded from Homes to also include Businesses. We offer personal cleaning plans based on a client's specific needs for their home or business. We offer additional services that we have developed based on the needs of our customer's like ozone treatments, Immaculate Appliance Maintenance+ Packages, steam cleaning, grout cleaning and sealing, as well as more. We love that our business offers the opportunity for our clients to spend more time with their families instead of deep cleaning their homes.

Name: Friese Umzüge GmbH
Description:
Sehr geehrte Kundin, sehr geehrter Kunde,

wir sind ein 1982 gegründetes, dabei jung gebliebenes und motiviertes Familienunternehmen aus Stuttgart.
Über 25 Jahre waren wir in der Möbel- und nun seit mittlerweile fast 15 Jahren in der Umzugsbranche tätig.
Bedingt durch unser freundlich, kompetentes Fachpersonal und deren KnowHow können wir alle anfallenden Arbeiten selbst durchführen.
Der Aufbau unserer Transportfahrzeuge ist speziell für Umzüge und Möbeltransporte zugeschnitten.
Auf jedem Fahrzeug befinden sich ausreichend Gurte und Decken zum Befestigen und Schützen ihrer Möbel.
Selbstverständlich können Sie bei uns ihre Umzugskartons erwerben. Auch weiteres Umzugsmaterial wie Luftpolsterfolie, Packpapier, Packseide, Stretchfolie und Klebebänder können Sie bei uns vor Ihrem Umzug erhalten. Damit Sie in Ruhe packen und am Umzugstag keinen unnötigen Stress haben. Ihre hängende Kleidung transportieren wir in Kleiderkisten, welche wir am Umzugstag mitbringen und am Ende des selbigen wieder mitnehmen können. Während wir Ihre Kleiderschränke abbauen, transportieren und aufbauen, ist Ihre hängende Kleidung umzugssicher verstaut.
Im Anschluss hängen wir diese in Ihren, in der neuen Wohnung wieder aufgebauten Kleiderschrank.
Unsere Firmenphilosophie sind terminorientierte Lieferung, Zuverlässigkeit, Flexibilität und vor allem ihre Zufriedenheit.

Bei uns stehen Sie im Vordergrund.

Unsere Leistungen umfassen:
- Umzüge
- Möbel- und Einrichtungstransporte aller Art (exkl. Tresor, Klavier, Schwerlast, etc.)
- Entrümpelungen (Auf Wunsch besenrein, ggf. inkl. Entfernen des Teppichboden)
- Einlagerungen
- Ab- und Wiederaufbau ihrer Möbel.

Sie erhalten von uns eine ordnungsgemäße Rechnung mit Steuernummer und ausgewiesener MwSt. zur Vorlage bei ihrem Finanzamt.

Wir würden uns freuen, Ihren Umzug für Sie durchführen zu dürfen.

Mit freundlichen Grüßen
Ihr Team der Friese Umzüge GmbH
Wollgrasweg 37
70599 Stuttgart-Plieningen

Die DIV Gebäude- und Unterhaltsreinigungen AG in Wittenbach wurde im März 2000 gegründet und verrichtet Reinigungs- und Unterhaltsarbeiten für Privat- und Geschäftskunden. Die Firma ist in der Region St. Gallen und Umgebung als qualitatives und etabliertes Dienstleistungsunternehmen bekannt, das in den vergangen Jahren ein anhaltendes Wachstum verzeichnen konnte. Aktuell beschäftigt die DIV Gebäude- und Unterhaltsreinigungen AG unter den Geschäftsführern und Gründern Dragan und Vesna Mihajlovic rund 15 Mitarbeitende.

Das sind unsere Stärken:
- Langjährige Erfahrung
- Effizienz
- Termintreue
- Qualität
- Flexibilität
- motivierte Mitarbeiter

Unsere Philosophie:
- Wir legen besonderen Wert auf das hohe Niveau unserer Dienstleistungen.
- Wir fordern und fördern die Flexibilität.
- Wir setzen stets auf innovative Technologien.
- Wir erreichen unsere Ziele im Team.

Die DIV Gebäude- und Unterhaltsreinigungen AG nimmt ihre Mitarbeitenden als wertvollen Teil der Firma wahr und legt entsprechend grossen Wert darauf, diesen gebührend Respekt entgegenzubringen und sie angemessen zu entlöhnen. Als Mitglied der Paritätischen Kommission der Reinigungsbranche in der Deutschschweiz unterstützen wir daher auch die Kampagne www.fair-clean.ch, die sich für gerechte Löhne in der Reinigungsbranche einsetzt.

Description:

Our community is within walking distance of Phipps Plaza, grocery stores, Marta transit and many other events in Brookhaven.

PTP has a variety of 1 and 2 bedroom floor plans varying in size and flex room space. All of our units have private balconies and designated parking.

Outdoor amenities include a large pool, with a fountain and plenty of sunbathing spots. Grills are located throughout the property. Two electric car charging stations in each parking garage.  Multiple green space areas and courtyards with seating throughout the property as well as a dog park.

Other property services include valet trash, 24 hour access package room, recycling, dog care stations and concierge gate.

We also support our residential businesses through our Peachtree Place Business connect directory.

Residents can participate in a variety of community based activities from landscaping to social events that bring our community together.

Name: Earthwise India Private Limited
Description:
EARTHWISE MANUFACTURING INC.

Saving lives through sustainable, science-based innovation—that's the heart of our mission at Earthwise. We envision a world where families no longer fear diseases transmitted by insects like mosquitoes.

Our first products, Biotraps and Aedes Mosquito Killers, are the world’s first biodegradable mosquito eradication devices, developed in partnership with the Dengue Action Response Team in Queensland, Australia. Extensive research, development and trials have been conducted across 6 continents to establish the strength of the products against all genera of mosquitoes. Our most extensive trials were conducted in the Amazon region of Brazil, possibly the most rugged environment to prove efficacy.

What makes Earthwise unique is our commitment to both people and the environment. Our products are environmentally conscious, affordable, and offer a lasting solution for mosquito control, designed to minimize impact on ecosystems. We’re not just killing mosquitoes—we’re working to build healthier, safer communities.

Ihr Leben – Zwischen Chaos und Sehnsucht

Kennen Sie das Gefühl?

Der Wecker klingelt, und schon bevor Sie die Augen öffnen, spüren Sie das Gewicht des Tages. Die Liste der Aufgaben, die auf Sie warten, scheint endlos. Kinder, die Aufmerksamkeit brauchen, ein Garten, der verwildert, ein Haus, das nach Pflege schreit. Sie hetzen von einem Termin zum nächsten, immer auf der Suche nach einem Moment zum Durchatmen.

Der Wendepunkt:

Dann entdecken Sie uns – Ihre persönliche Concierge Group. Ein Funke Hoffnung in einem Meer von Verpflichtungen. Wir verstehen Ihre Kämpfe, Ihre Sehnsüchte, Ihre unerfüllten Träume.

Die Lösung:

Wir sind hier, um die Last von Ihren Schultern zu nehmen. Stellen Sie sich vor: Ein Leben, in dem Sie endlich Zeit haben, sich auf das zu konzentrieren, was wirklich zählt. Ein Leben, in dem ‚Heute‘ nicht nur ein weiterer Tag ist, sondern eine Chance, zu leben, zu lieben, zu lachen.

Ihr Triumph:

Mit uns an Ihrer Seite finden Sie den Weg zurück zu sich selbst. Sie sind nicht mehr der Getriebene, sondern der Gestalter Ihres Lebens. Jeder Tag ist eine Leinwand, und Sie halten den Pinsel.

Ihr nächster Schritt:

Bereit, das Ruder zu übernehmen? Kontaktieren Sie uns und beginnen Sie Ihre Reise zum ‚Heute Leben‘

Name: Crosslink Aquatic Sdn Bhd
Description:
Since its establishment in 1986, CROSSLINK has specialised in designing and constructing water purification systems for various industries. Initially, the company did not see a need to enter the domestic market, believing municipal water was safe for direct consumption.

However, two significant incidents changed this perspective. The first occurred in 1999, following a Japanese Encephalitis (JE) outbreak in Bukit Pelanduk, where many pig farmers died. CROSSLINK was tasked with designing and building a water treatment plant for affected residents. The company discovered that the water source was a poorly managed tube-well in an oil palm plantation, inadequately treated by simply bubbling chlorine gas into a reservoir. This raised concerns about whether residents had been consuming barely treated water before the new system was installed and whether this indirectly contributed to the JE outbreak.

The second incident was in 1993, during a project tender review. A sarcastic note from a consultant highlighted that the city water maintained a high chlorine level, implying it was necessary due to ongoing epidemics. This observation prompted concerns about the safety and quality of the municipal water supply.

CROSSLINK’s founder was troubled by these discoveries and noted the rise of unprofessional traders exploiting the high chlorine content issue by selling water filters. These filters, while removing chlorine, inadvertently produced harmful toxins, posing additional risks to consumers. These experiences led the company to expand into the domestic market, emphasising the need for reliable household water filtration solutions.
Location: Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur
